name: zvid_image_release_owned_buffers
description: zVid_Image::ReleaseOwnedBuffers frees owned pixel, alpha, and palette buffers according to image ownership flags, clears released pointers, and clears ownership bits.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ReleaseOwnedBuffers@zVid_Image@@YIXPAUzVidImagePartial@@@Z at 0x46ecf0 still fails: 102 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation bytes masked, 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 122 bytes, VC object symbol size 128 bytes.

Reviewed difference is imported free call/source-shape drift: original loads the imported free pointer into edi and reuses it for each owned buffer, while current source emits direct free relocations. The native smoke verifies owned pixel/alpha/palette releases, ownership-bit clearing, and shared palette retention.
